name: Secret Saboteurs
overview: Secret Saboteurs is a game where 8 YouTubers enter a house and must complete daily tasks in order to secure $100,000, while 3 of them attempt to sabotage their game. When the saboteurs successfully sabotage a task, they steal $10,000 of the grand prize from the rest of the participants.

trailers.title: Secret Saboteurs LIVE After Show (Behind The Scenes House Tour + Q&A)
